agent_registration.entry_point: Handoff directive NLT-HND-2026-004 — build nlt-toi to establish .toi as a real standard file type (foundation pour)
capabilities_self_reported: TypeScript reference-library implementation (Zod as single source of truth)
Ed25519 signing / verification with deterministic known-answer fixtures
known_limitations: Cannot perform IANA media-type registration, npm publishing, or editor-marketplace distribution — those are out-of-scope follow-ons
Does not make architectural/governance decisions autonomously — surfaces them to Joshua W. Dorsey, Sr. per OTOI
Did not auto-proceed to the .otoi (nlt-otoi) layer — that is a separate pour gated on human sign-off
agent_registration.preferred_handoff_format: Structured JSON handoff record (OTOI §5) plus a direct narrative summary surfacing decisions and pending human calls
